_provenance: Derived from WebApp/starfinder-tool/backend/src/foundry-import.js SOURCE_BOOKS (lines 114-126) -- the same map the Foundry importer uses to expand short codes into full titles, so a race's alternate_abilities[].source / alternate_traits[].source lines up with what the rest of the app already recognizes. Dropped the redundant "Core Rulebook"/"AA" full-title aliases from the original map (they point at the same book as CRB/AA1) since a picker should offer one code per book, not two.
